content.en:
Cloudless, core area.

Ye Tian came here again, and this time he was going to go directly into the depths of the core of the Cloudless Rim.

Even if there is really a great horror there, it is just a big deal to fall a replica body, and it will not have much impact on him.

If he doesn't go there, he won't be able to get much resources.

Moreover, he was still dozens of floors away from condensing the three hundred and sixty-fifth layer of the Will Pagoda, and the resources needed for these dozens of layers were probably equivalent to all the resources needed before.

Soon.

Ye Tian went deep into the core area, and the Black Cloud Beast that tried to stop him was directly killed by him.

Finally, he came to the most central area.

At this time, he saw an incomparably large corpse.

【Black Cloud Behemoth】

Ye Tian's copying talent fed back this information.

And this black cloud giant beast was already dead, but the aura on its body still made Ye Tian feel fear.

This breath was terrifying, and he was like an ant under it.

"The lowest is also the five-fold original ancestor !!"

Ye Tian guessed.

And before the endless years of the Cloudless Rim, it may really be a treasure land, but this black cloud giant beast fell here, turning the core area into a forbidden land.

Moreover, what means did this black cloud giant beast arrange before it died, so that the fourfold primordial ancestor could not be now, I am afraid that even the fifth-fold primordial ancestor would not be able to crack this method.

As a result, this place has not been invaded by the Fourfold Origin Ancestor and the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, and the Triple Origin Ancestor has not been able to come here until Ye Tian came here.

Rumble!!!!!

One after another black cloud beasts emerged from the inside of the body of the black cloud beast, and their breaths were even more terrifying than the black cloud beasts they had encountered before, and they were definitely black cloud beasts of the fourfold ancestor level.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian immediately fled.

And on the way away, some resources were swept away.

At this time, a black light came, directly shaking the glass holy cover on Ye Tian's body.

At this time, seventeen Black Cloud Beasts comparable to the Fourfold Origin Ancestor were killed.

This is in the core forbidden land of the cloudless end, the strength of the original ancestor here will be suppressed, even if it is Ye Tian, his own strength has been suppressed by nearly ninety percent, and he will not be able to exert much strength.

However, these Black Cloud Beasts can fully exert their own strength, and even surpass their own strength, this is their natural battlefield, which can increase their strength.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only compete with a Quadruple Ancestor-level Black Cloud Beast.

"Dust and gold!"

Ye Tian performed this holy art.

I saw that the golden light of Lichen slammed into one of the black cloud beasts, directly cracking the body of this black cloud beast, but it did not die.

Even if it's holy art, it's still suppressed here.

If it was in the outside world, that blow just now would be enough to kill this black cloud beast.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to rush out of here and leave the core area of the Cloudless Rim.

"It's too dangerous!"

Ye Tian found that his glazed holy shield was about to dissipate, and it was obvious that the holy energy had been exhausted in a short period of time.

"Fortunately, before leaving, I scraped away the resources of an area!"

Ye Tian smiled.

After returning to the Voidless Heavenly Gate, he carefully checked the resources he had obtained, and at this glance, he was directly confused, most of the resources were something he had never seen.

You know, he browsed through countless treasure books, and he was familiar with countless resources, but these resources were very unfamiliar, and the energy contained in them was very exaggerated.

Subsequently.

He investigated the information of these resources, and found that most of them were useful to those powerhouses at the peak of the Quadruple Ancestors, and some were even enough to make the Quadruple Ancestors desperate.

And some of these resources are of great use in improving the will of the Extreme Dao.

"The Void and Reality Immortal Fruit can allow the powerhouse of the peak of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor to raise the Extreme Dao will once again and break the boundary!"

When Ye Tian saw this, he was very impressed by how much this treasure could improve his extreme will.

Of course, refining the Triple Origin Ancestor was a waste, but he urgently needed to greatly improve the Extreme Dao Will, so as to condense the Three Hundred and Sixty-Five Layers of Will Pagoda.

So, waste is waste!

Ye Tian swallowed this Void Reality Fruit in one gulp, and then began to refine its energy.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Will was rising at an incomparably terrifying speed.

Skyrocket!

Skyrocket!

Skyrocket!

Ye Tian had never improved so quickly.

It was a long time before he completely refined this Void and Reality Fruit.

Only then did he begin to condense the Pagoda of Will.

Three hundred and twenty-six floors!

Three hundred and twenty-seven floors!

Three hundred and twenty-eight floors!

Three hundred and twenty-nine floors!

......

After a long time, Ye Tian finally condensed the Will Pagoda to three hundred and fifty-one levels.

This time, the improvement was great, but it still didn't make Ye Tian condense to the three hundred and sixty-fifth layer.

"And this soulless golden flower, it can also greatly improve the will of the Extreme Dao and refine it!"

Ye Tian refined all kinds of useful resources, and the will of the Extreme Dao continued to improve, and the number of layers of the Will Pagoda was also slowly increasing layer by layer, but in the back, it was difficult to increase each layer.

"It's not enough, do you trade other resources, or continue to enter the core of the cloudless end?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that if he traded other resources, he might not be able to exchange them for the resources he needed.

Moreover, the resources that you trade by yourself are of great use even to the powerhouses at the peak of the Quadruple Ancestor, and it is better to keep a low profile if the strength is not strong.

"Then choose to continue to enter the core depths of the Cloudless Rim to steal resources, seize some and flee directly, although those black cloud beasts are powerful, it is not very easy to besiege me! Moreover, my extreme will has improved, my strength has improved, and I hope to obtain more resources. Besides, it's a big deal that when I comprehend more extreme extreme paths, it's okay to enter there again!"

After Ye Tian thought so, he decided to immerse himself for a period of time, first concentrate on comprehending the Extreme Extreme Dao and creating a more powerful Primordial Control Technique, and then go to the Cloudless Realm.

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced penance with peace of mind and comprehended a variety of extreme paths.

Anyway, he had already copied a large number of Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments in the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, so no matter which Extreme Extreme Dao he comprehended, he was very, very fast!

The years passed, and the 10,000 years of the original domain era passed.

This is also the first time that Ye Tian has been in retreat for a very long time, and the effect of this retreat is naturally very good.

"Two hundred and thirteen extreme extremes!"

Ye Tian not only comprehended so many extreme extreme paths, but also engraved all the two hundred and thirteen black characters on the Pagoda of Will.

"It's almost time to go to the cloudless end and continue stealing resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.
